name: Design Spore
oneLiner: AI services studio — chatbots, automation, websites, and launches for businesses ready to actually use AI.

name: Mission Control
oneLiner: Unified business dashboard — Kanban task management, CRM with Gmail import, and an AI agent fleet manager with cost tracking.

name: Government AI Consulting
oneLiner: AI readiness briefings, policy frameworks, and implementation support for local and regional governments.

name: Clearwater AI Meetups
oneLiner: Regular AI-for-business education events making practical AI accessible to local business owners and decision-makers.

name: Portal.Place
oneLiner: A working prototype for the next generation of intentional, AI-assisted rural communities — land, programs, membership, and investor access.

name: Portal.Place Intel
oneLiner: AI-enriched regional intelligence feed — land deals, grants, jobs, events, and community news for people actively building resilient communities.

name: Village Dashboard
oneLiner: Smart village operating system — members, fundraising, governance, operations, farm & IoT, energy, and marketplace in one dashboard.

name: Wells Gray Resort Booking System
oneLiner: Custom campground booking system with interactive site map, OTA sync across 6 platforms, and zero per-booking fees.

name: CampSync
oneLiner: Self-hosted booking channel manager syncing availability across Checkfront, Airbnb, HipCamp, Pitchup, and Booking.com.

name: Future Thinkers
oneLiner: 130+ episodes exploring technology, consciousness, and the future of civilization. Running since 2013. Custom podcast player, no third-party CMS.
